notes: Descriptive-statistics section of the IST analysis (data prep + PROC FORMAT + the overall and by-treatment PROC FREQ / PROC MEANS tables) — the same code and inline 100-row sample as t001, trimmed before the regression sections so it runs in a few seconds. Same substitutions as t001 (inline DATALINES in place of the external PROC IMPORT path; the yes/no user format named $yn_format instead of $format).
